  1. DOS
  2. DOE
  3. Election Results
  4. 2026 Election Night Results

2026 Election Night Results

The Division of Elections does not post any official or unofficial results on Election Night.

The best source for election night results are the local county websites linked below.

 

County Websites

Atlantic County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Atlantic/126380/web.345435/#/summary
Bergen County
https://www.bergencountyclerk.gov/Election/
Burlington County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Burlington/126521/web.345435/#/summary
Camden County
https://www.camdencounty.com/service/voting-and-elections/election-results/
Cape May County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Cape_May/126519/web.345435/#/summary
Cumberland County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Cumberland
Essex County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Essex/126379/web.345435/#/summary
Gloucester County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Gloucester/126344/web.345435/#/summary
Hudson County
https://admin.enr.clarityelections.com/files/NJ/Hudson/126484/web.345435/#/summary?v=373350
Hunterdon County
https://www.co.hunterdon.nj.us/236/County-Clerk
Mercer County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Mercer/126382/web.345435/#/summary
Middlesex County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Middlesex/126488/web.345435/#/summary
Monmouth County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Monmouth/126520/web.345435/#/summary
Morris County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Morris/126492/web.345435/#/summary
Ocean County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Ocean/126367/web.345435/#/summary
Passaic County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Passaic/
Salem County
https://www.livevoterturnout.com/ENR/salemnjenr/12/en/Index_12.html
Somerset County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Somerset/
Sussex County
https://www.sussex.nj.us/934/Primary-Election
Union County
https://results.enr.clarityelections.com/NJ/Union/126417/web.345435/#/summary
Warren County
https://www.warrencountyvotes.com/elections/past-election-results

Office Address

Tel: 609-292-3760, 609-789-0124   Fax: 609-777-1280
Email: nj.elections@sos.nj.gov
